# Magneto AI Task: Implement NextAuth.js authentication flow with role-based access

> This prompt was generated by Magneto AI to give you scoped, structured context.
> It contains only the files and constraints relevant to this task — saving tokens and improving quality.

## Task

- **ID:** NEXT-001
- **Title:** Implement NextAuth.js authentication flow with role-based access
- **Type:** feature-implementation
- **Classification:** feature-implementation

### Description

Add complete authentication using NextAuth.js with Google and GitHub OAuth providers. Implement role-based access control (RBAC) for admin, editor, and viewer roles. Protect API routes and pages with middleware. Add session persistence and token refresh logic.

### Constraints (MUST follow)

- Must use NextAuth.js v5 (Auth.js)
- Must support Google and GitHub OAuth providers
- Must implement RBAC with at least 3 roles: admin, editor, viewer
- Must protect all /dashboard/* routes via middleware
- Must not store sensitive tokens in localStorage
- Must handle token refresh without user interruption
- Must include CSRF protection

### Scoped Files

Only these files/directories are in scope for this task:

- `src/app/api/auth/`
- `src/middleware.ts`
- `src/lib/auth.ts`
- `src/components/auth/`
- `src/app/(protected)/`
- `src/types/next-auth.d.ts`

## Security Constraints

- **Risk Level:** medium
- **Approval Required:** No
- **Security Notes:** Involves authentication or authorization changes

You are acting as the **backend** agent. Analyze and implement backend logic, APIs, data models, and architecture.
